item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Ben Kamisar
item.description: Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin on Thursday released the party’s autopsy report on the 2024 election after facing intense pressure to do so

media:content.media:text: DNC Chair Ken Martin
media:content.media:description: Ken Martin, chair of the Democratic National Committee, in 2025.

item.title: DNC releases 2024 autopsy, with chair apologizing for ‘creating an even bigger distraction’

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-IRAN-US-ISRAEL-WAR-PROTEST
media:content.media:description: Women hold Iran's national flag and photos of country's supreme leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei and his predecessor and late father Ayatollah Ali Khamenei during an anti-US and Israel protest at the Hafte Tir Square in Tehran on May 17, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Iran And US Remain In Stalemate Over Strait Of Hormuz
media:content.media:description: Nearly three months since the war began with U.S. and Israeli airstrikes Feb. 28, Iran maintains a chokehold on the key waterway.

media:content.media:text: JD Vance arrives in Pakistan.
media:content.media:description: Munir welcomed Vice President JD Vance to Islamabad in Islamabad last month for talks that fell short of a peace deal.

item.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’

item.description: An Air France flight headed to Detroit suddenly diverted to Canada over concerns that a Congolese passenger may have been exposed to Ebola. Meanwhile, the American doctor who tested positive for the virus is now in stable condition, according to the CDC. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Detroit-Bound Plane Diverted to Canada Over Ebola Concerns
media:content.media:description: An Air France flight headed to Detroit suddenly diverted to Canada over concerns that a Congolese passenger may have been exposed to Ebola. Meanwhile, the American doctor who tested positive for the virus is now in stable condition, according to the CDC. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

item.title: Detroit-Bound Plane Diverted to Canada Over Ebola Concerns

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: A judge on Thursday dismissed the criminal case against a former Virginia elementary school assistant principal who was accused of ignoring warnings before a 6-year-old student shot and wounded his teacher.

media:content.media:text: Ebony Parker.
media:content.media:description: Former Richneck Elementary School assistant principal Ebony Parker looks back into the courtroom during Abby Zwerner's lawsuit against her on Oct. 28, 2025, in Newport News, Va.

media:content.media:text: Abby Zwerner looks back while waiting for court to begin.
media:content.media:description: Former Richneck Elementary School teacher Abby Zwerner in Newport News, Va., in 2025.

item.title: Judge dismisses all child neglect counts against Newport News assistant principal Ebony Parker

item.description: As Stephen Colbert says goodbye at CBS, Byron Allen steps into the coveted slot with "Comics Unleashed." NBC News' Chloe Melas sat down with him to talk about his deal, media empire, and plans for a new era of network comedy.

media:content.media:title: Comedian and businessman Byron Allen on future of late night
media:content.media:description: As Stephen Colbert says goodbye at CBS, Byron Allen steps into the coveted slot with "Comics Unleashed." NBC News' Chloe Melas sat down with him to talk about his deal, media empire, and plans for a new era of network comedy.

item.title: Comedian and businessman Byron Allen on future of late night

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Olshan
item.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.
item.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Jared Perlo
Monica Alba
item.description: President Donald Trump scrapped an executive order signing Thursday. The order is expected to lay out partnerships with leading AI companies to vet new models.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump in the Oval Office on May 21, 2026.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump in the Oval Office on Thursday.

item.title: Trump abruptly scraps signing of landmark executive order regulating AI

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: A man was arrested in Connecticut this week after officials in Virginia say new evidence links him to the murder and rape of a woman 40 years ago.

media:content.media:text: Roberta Walls.
media:content.media:description: Roberta Walls.

media:content.media:text: Virginia Beach Police Department hold a press conference on Wednesday on the arrest.
media:content.media:description: Roberta Walls.

item.title: Man arrested in 40-year-old rape and murder case after forensic genealogy investigation

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani plans to launch a livestream series called “Talk with the People”

media:content.media:text: New York Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani at his transition office
media:content.media:description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a livestream series on Twitch.

item.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a chat show on Twitch

item.dc:creator: Abigail Brooks
item.description: The execution for Tony Carruthers was called off Thursday after the state department of corrections struggled to find a vein to set a backup injection line.“Medical personnel quickly established a primary IV line; however, the team was unable to immediately establish a backup line pursuant to the lethal injection execution protocol,” according to a statement from the Tennessee Department of Corrections

media:content.media:credit: Tennessee Department of Correction via AP
media:content.media:text: Tony Carruthers.
media:content.media:description: Tony Carruthers.

item.title: Tennessee execution paused after corrections couldn’t find a vein, lawyers say

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: In a heart-rending victim impact statement, Matthew Perry’s mother, Suzanne Morrison, condemned the actor’s former assistant Kenneth Iwamasa, saying he enabled the addiction that led to her son’s death in 2023.“His number one responsibility was to ensure that Matthew remained what he wanted to be: drug‑free,” Morrison wrote.

media:content.media:text: Actor Matthew Perry and his mother Suzanne Morrison attend the Los Angeles Consul General of Canada and Los Angeles Kings'' tribute for Garnet "Ace Bailey Oct. 3, 2001 in Los Angeles, CA.
media:content.media:description: Actor Matthew Perry and his mother, Suzanne Morrison, in 2001.

item.title: ‘Paid the price’: Matthew Perry’s mother condemns assistant in overdose case

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Former Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan on Thursday ended his independent campaign for governor in Michigan, citing national headwinds that are boosting Democrats.“If we were even in the polls and behind in fundraising, we have a path to winning.

media:content.media:text: Former Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan in 2025.
media:content.media:description: Former Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan, a Democrat-turned-independent, dropped out of the Michigan governor's race.

item.title: Former Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan ends independent bid for Michigan governor

item.dc:creator: Melanie Zanona
Kyle Stewart
item.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr.’s colleagues in Washington and constituents in New Jersey all seem to be asking the same question: Where is the congressman?

media:content.media:text: Tom Kean Nov 3
media:content.media:description: Rep. Tom Kean, R-N.J., pictured at the Capitol in 2023, has not said when he'll return.

media:content.media:text: A man passes the office door of U.S. Rep. Kean on Capitol Hill in Washington
media:content.media:description: Rep. Tom Kean, R-N.J., pictured at the Capitol in 2023, has not said when he'll return.

item.title: Rep. Tom Kean hasn’t been seen in his district. Voters are split on his mysterious absence.

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: A judge on Thursday dismissed the criminal case against a former Virginia elementary school assistant principal who was accused of ignoring warnings before a 6-year-old student shot and wounded his teacher.

media:content.media:text: Ebony Parker.
media:content.media:description: Former Richneck Elementary School assistant principal Ebony Parker looks back into the courtroom during Abby Zwerner's lawsuit against her on Oct. 28, 2025, in Newport News, Va.

media:content.media:text: Abby Zwerner looks back while waiting for court to begin.
media:content.media:description: Former Richneck Elementary School teacher Abby Zwerner in Newport News, Va., in 2025.

item.title: Judge dismisses all child neglect counts against Newport News assistant principal Ebony Parker

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Ben Kamisar
item.description: Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin on Thursday released the party’s autopsy report on the 2024 election after facing intense pressure to do so

media:content.media:text: DNC Chair Ken Martin
media:content.media:description: Ken Martin, chair of the Democratic National Committee, in 2025.

item.title: DNC releases 2024 autopsy, with chair apologizing for ‘creating an even bigger distraction’

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
Kathryn Prociv
item.description: Memorial Day weekend travelers are facing a wet and potentially disruptive start to the holiday, with storms expected to bring heavy rain, flash flooding and travel delays across large parts of the country

media:content.media:text: Rangers Rockies Baseball
media:content.media:description: A storm passes over Coors Field in the fourth inning of a baseball game in Denver on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Thunderstorm Passes Through New York City
media:content.media:description: A storm passes over Coors Field in the fourth inning of a baseball game in Denver on Wednesday.

item.title: Memorial Day travel snarled as storms threaten flooding from Texas to Northeast

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: SpaceX is set to launch a new prototype of its Starship megarocket — the system NASA may use to land astronauts back to the moon — on a key test flight Thursday

media:content.media:text: Starship V3 on the launch pad during a wet dress rehearsal.
media:content.media:description: Starship V3 on the launch pad during a "wet" dress rehearsal.

item.title: SpaceX to launch an even bigger Starship prototype

item.dc:creator: Maggie Vespa
Kailani Koenig
Patrick Smith
item.description: A man from New York State who was on board the Hondius cruise ship — which became the center of an outbreak of hantavirus that killed three people earlier this month — compared being forced to quarantine at the Nebraska health facility to being in “prison.”The 30-year-old man, who asked not to be identified because of concerns for his safety and harassment of other named passengers, told NBC News by phone that he wants to be able to quarantine at home.

media:content.media:text: US Hantavirus-Ship
media:content.media:description: Nebraska Medicine's Davis Global Center is seen on Sunday, May 10,2026 in Omaha, Neb. where American passengers from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship will quarantine.

media:content.media:text: Hantavirus Outbreak
media:content.media:description: U.S. passengers from the cruise ship MV Hondius arrive at the University of Nebraska Medical Center Davis Global Center, in Omaha, on Monday.

item.title: Man who was on hantavirus cruise ship says Nebraska isolation center feels like ‘prison’

item.dc:creator: Kayla Steinberg
item.description: Walmart reported positive earnings, but U.S. consumers are struggling with rising costs.

media:content.media:text: Walmart Reports Quarterly Earnings
media:content.media:description: Rising fuel costs impacted Walmart's profits and its customers' shopping habits during the company's first quarter.

item.title: Walmart signals it may raise prices in response to soaring fuel costs

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: This expert-approved tech helps seniors maintain independence while aging in place. Shop health wearables, medication dispensers and smart home devices.
item.title: 9 problem-solving devices that help seniors maintain independence

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: According to pest control experts, if you have bed bugs, you should wash your sheets with hot water and then call a professional exterminator.

media:content.media:text: The most common ways to pick up bed bugs is through travelling or bringing second-hand furniture into your home.
media:content.media:description: The most common ways to pick up bed bugs is through travelling or bringing second-hand furniture into your home.

media:content.media:text: The most common ways to pick up bed bugs is through travelling or bringing second-hand furniture into your home.
media:content.media:description: The most common ways to pick up bed bugs is through travelling or bringing second-hand furniture into your home.

item.title: How to get rid of (and prevent) bed bugs

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: The Ninja Creami is one of the best ice cream makers, but are there better options? I tested it against KitchenAid, Cuisinart Fast Freeze and more to find out.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami on a granite table with the mixing paddle beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Cuisinart FastFreeze ice cream maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Light green KitchenAid Stand Mixer with ice cream maker attachment installed.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Cuisinart Ice Cream Maker
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The GreenPan Frost sitting on a table with the lid beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Nutribullet Chill Ice Cream Maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

item.title: I tested the Ninja Creami against five popular competitors, and the results shocked me

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists say that Birkenstock Arizona sandals are some of the most comfortable shoes on the market thanks to the built-in arch support. Right now, get them for 40 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Birkenstock Arizona sandals are 40% off

item.dc:creator: Abigail Brooks
item.description: The execution for Tony Carruthers was called off Thursday after the state department of corrections struggled to find a vein to set a backup injection line.“Medical personnel quickly established a primary IV line; however, the team was unable to immediately establish a backup line pursuant to the lethal injection execution protocol,” according to a statement from the Tennessee Department of Corrections

media:content.media:credit: Tennessee Department of Correction via AP
media:content.media:text: Tony Carruthers.
media:content.media:description: Tony Carruthers.

item.title: Tennessee execution paused after corrections couldn’t find a vein, lawyers say
